channels.release_body_text: Independent, unofficial build of Zap (a fork of the AGPL-licensed Warp terminal). Not affiliated with or endorsed by Warp (Denver Technologies, Inc.) or zerx-lab. Source for this exact release is the tagged commit in this repository. Provided as-is, without warranty (AGPL-3.0 §15–16).
